item.title: I don't know about you but I need some wholesome right about now.
item.description: I'm hurting. Bad. But someone posted a wholesome dump and it helped a little, so I thought maybe I'd do my part too.
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: It's the unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends. also, thank you for being awesome
legend
no need to brag
what am i gonna, what am i gonna, what am i gonna get??! (for chrimbus)
not autistic but i do this if i'm near the microwave
there's a few more xmas memes in here
that is a large bear
hugs are nice
jealous?
i don't remember even remember this part tbh. was it supposed to be a joke?
i have a love/hate relationship with that song. i would say its a classic
all other rooms are fine, hedgehog it up
watch out, dave coulier
mmm hmm
we've all done this
the 'not' is underlined so you know it's true
and on that note!
that's it for me... happy holidays and see ya in a few days
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Technically...
item.description: Wow, most viral. That's a first for me. Thank you all. I'm glad you enjoyed this as much as I did.

item.title: It may take me a a couple of hours to reply say if I’m sleeping or in active family time mode but I’ll check the DMs periodically.
item.description: I rarely stream now but I promise I’ll be on Christmas Eve afternoon/early evening for a bit if you wanna chat or you like mediocre at best content. https://www.twitch.tv/madamerainbowpants Also an imgurian in the comments suggested selfie bingo. I wanna do it. Find the bingo here: https://imgur.com/gallery/BAR0a7B FP edit: This person is hurting. They’ve got kids. Now I’m panicking. Send some stay alive words please. https://imgur.com/gallery/4SPkWXO
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: This is some bullshit
item.description: The only videos I had were local youth football games, which my son played in, that I recorded on behalf of the coaches and other parents. Apparently, I violated YouTube's spam, deceptive practices and scam policy but they didn't bother to tell me how. I'm trying to appeal because of the fact that my dumbass deleted the games from my SD cards after uploading them and have just lost 4 years of game footage. However, I can't appeal since I'm an even bigger dumbass that has no clue what his randomly generated URL was.
item.dc:creator: AwesomeDad420

item.title: Northern Birbs are friendly birbs! Sound on!
item.description: In the Great White North the birbs are cold but talkative! #birbfriend #birds #nature #cute #ontario (FP: Mr Corvid made it a second time - had to repost to remove voice, send us your beautiful beards!)
item.dc:creator: Agnoka

item.title: Not looking forward to this..
item.description: Not by choice, unfortunately I don't think I'm strong enough at this point. I've been drinking boxed chardonnay for about 5 years like it's juice, after a terrible breakup and the pandemic hit at the same time. I've been cutting down for the last few months, but I'm still definitely addicted. I had planned to bring some with me to Christmas at my parents, who do not drink and frown on it. They also live in the middle of nowhere, and since my car isn't running well right now, my dad gave me a lift. Well, the bag leaked and now here I am, stranded for the next 3 days. I don't think I'm in any danger as far as withdrawals are concerned, but I have no clue how I'm going to weather my mom's psychopathy which seems a bit more intense this year. I'm just going to try and keep myself busy, I've got my kindle loaded with a couple books to read. Send me funny memes, book reccomendations, (epic fantasy, I think I've read almost every popular series at this point) tv shows (comedy, horror, scifi fantasy) Good luck to all of you out there having to deal with toxic family. Mv edit : Thank you guys so much for all the support and reccomendations! My to-read list just got a whole lot longer. It's about 1 am here, and things are getting a little rough. I definitely feel twitchy, hot & cold, and nervous as a cat in a room full of rocking chairs. I've been drinking chamomile tea and stuffing my face with gingerbread and sugar cookies. I'm just forcing myself to read, as watching TV doesn't really engage my mind (plus seeing people drink doesn't help.)
item.dc:creator: nomorehate

item.title: Musk hiring expert to bust union
item.description: Elon Musk is trying to change Swedish law to avoid bargaining with unions. But a Tesla strike is spreading like wildfire across Scandinavia. As someone on the streets of Stockholm told us, "The harder they try, the bigger the resistance." Full video: https://www.threads.net/@perfectunion/post/C1LJ-VMsjsx
item.dc:creator: AjKaramba

item.title: Cows love scritches
item.description: https://www.gentlebarn.org/donate - Thinking about making a donation as a holiday gift? Support the Gentle Barn! If you donate please comment @OP or message me so I can thank you! I love to Meme for Good and direct people to awesome nonprofits.
item.dc:creator: rhinokitty

item.title: Images of Note: a Menace by choice
item.description:
hell yeah
I wanna go to IKEA now.
BRING. BACK. TRADITIONAL. CHRISTMAS. RABBLEROUSING!
they really didn't think this through.
zoom
Tigers moo.
ouo
basically!
me lately
Fun fact: The Go Compare guy is like...one of the UK's best Tenors. He fucking teaches opera.
This is not a meme, but this is a heritage railway near me looking really lovely in the snow :)
hell yeah, murder
:(
fuck, I look like this.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
